/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/qsecure_gui.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/qsecure_gui.dir/qsecure_gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qsecure_gui.dir/gui/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qsecure_gui.dir/gui/mainwindow.cpp.o -o qsecure_gui  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 libqsecure.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -largon2 -loqs
